column7: Lichen Removal Agent (LRA) is a concentrated removal agent for lichens, mosses and other fungi designed specifically to be used on solar panels, specially in very humid environments and with large amount of organic matter (near forest, agricultural plantations, etc.) LRA is a biodegradable product designed to be as delicate as possible with the components of the solar module (ARC, silicone and aluminium frame). The product will help break the bond between the lichen and the solar glass, making them easier to remove. This is a remediation product and should be used as such. To avoid the recurring use of the product please act preventively and protect your modules with one of our coatings. The coating will seal the glass and any future growth of lichen will not be bonded to it so strongly thus making them easier to remove. Dilution: 1kg of product for 10 litres of water. Use the Dosatron to accurately dilute your pure water! Click here to Download Safety Data Sheet Read the technical...

column3: Water Fed Brush | Tucker® Glide - 4 Pencil Jets - NEW Standard Size w/ Loct fitting Quad
column7: Designed for experienced and new window washers alike, this American made water fed brush is made from a new synthetic material that out performs boar bristle in our testing. Whereas boar bristle brushes will shed, these brushes will last far longer. Due to the nature of the bristle material you are able to get the boar bristle aggressive scrub, but also rinse on the glass in far more scenarios. The bristles will not hold dirt like boar bristle brushes so you will find these more forgiving for new comers in training or just getting started. This brush comes with 4 plumbed pencil jets, creating direct streams of high-pressure water that powers away grime. Pencil jets have long been the standard jet when rinsing glass. Available in 2 sizes - the standard (made for more of a residential size window) and the XL (made for more commercial size windows and solar panels) Details: Made in USA Full Trim Synthetic Bristle Material Lightweight LOCT Socket 4 Pencil Jets Jets Plumbed together...

Those looking for an aggressive scrub on windows will also benefit from this brush.

column7: All new for 2025! After 4,000 units we have upgraded the system - AGAIN! RIVAL-V2 by Tucker® Stainless Steel 4-Stage RO/DI System - MADE IN USA The RIVAL Cart is a 4-stage Pure Water system that comes on a powder coated lightweight steel frame made for years of abuse. The new Tucker® combination sediment/carbon pre-filter makes this a 4-stage filtration system! Large flat free tires help you navigate all terrains. New features on the Rival-V2 include: DI Saver System: Avoid TDS creep and lower your cost per gallon instantly with the Tucker® DI Saver System. Simply turn the 3-way valve to the RO position and you will bypass your DI filter. This is great for anyone wanting RO only water, those looking to test RO production simply, and those looking to bleed off high TDS water before sending it to the DI filter - saving you big money on your DI resin. column7: The perfect DIY project! The Tucker® DIY 4-Stage RO/DI Kit is a perfect option for those looking for an economical and effective way to produce pure water for window or solar panel cleaning. This kit is designed to easily mount on a skid, truck, or trailer, making it easy to transport the system wherever you need it! Our DIY kit includes everything you need to assemble your own 4-stage water purification system, including a sediment filter , carbon filter , reverse osmosis membrane , deionization filter , plus all required housings, fittings, brackets and tubing. You can also opt to include the Tucker® DIY 12v RO Booster Panel . The system is designed for long-lasting performance and offers exceptional value for money. column7: Tucker's commercial work horse! This system will produce more water than others making your cleaning time faster! The Tucker® - 4060. Most every system on the market uses a 40" RO Membrane that can supply 1 pole on line pressure. Using (2) 40" RO Membranes gives you more flow and capacity, but the size and weight makes it completely impractical in a mobile application. At Tucker® we have the unique opportunity to produce 30" RO Membranes that produce nearly the same water as the leading 40" RO Membranes on the market and when we combine 2 of them you get the performance of 80" or RO Membrane, but in a much more compact design. How's that? We use much lower operating pressure RO Membranes than anyone else in the market. column7: Introducing the Tucker® Ultimate residential Skid Designed for Compact Pick Ups . A first of its kind all in one drop in skid designed specifically with the professional window cleaner in mind. Whether you're looking to upgrade your existing set up, get a new truck on the road, or simply start a business this is the best option for you. It's essentially a business in a box! Made from aluminum and powder coated in the color of your choice. Designed to easily be forklifted in/out of your truck for storage. These skids are lightweight at only 600 pounds. column7: ALL STANDARD BRUSHES NOW INCLUDE THE LOCT SYSTEM TUCKER DUAL TRIM WATER FED BRUSH - BOAR AND NYLON BRISTLE HYBRID - 2 PENCIL JETS Our dual trim, hybrid water fed brushes are the ultimate glass cleaning brush for solar panel and window cleaning businesses. This hybrid, dual trim brush has bristles that are longer on the outer edge of the brush, allowing the operator to splay the bristles into corners and sides of the glass. The shorter, inner bristles remain upright and allow the tip of the bristle fiber to continue scrubbing directly on inner surface of the glass. This brush comes with 2 individually plumbed pencil jets, which help direct a high-pressure stream of water that assists the brush operator by blasting away stubborn dirt. Brush may come in red or black depending on availability. column7: If you're looking for an excellent 12V pump for siphoning your pure water tank and pushing water to your water fed pole and brush this is the best option. Or if you would like to draw water from a tank to feed you Tucker® DI system. This is the correct replacement pump for the delivery pump on a Fill n Go unit and our 12V Delivery Panel. SPECIFICATIONS OPEN FLOW RATE: 1.4 GPM MAX PSI: 90 PSI CURRENT: 9.9 AMPS @ 90 PSI The thread on the pump is 3/8" female NPT. Inlet/outlet fittings not included Optional fittings available here: Two 3/8" barb or Two 1/2" PTF NOTE With this pump we recommend the addition of the Tucker® Digital Flow Controller . Failure to use the Tucker® Digital Flow Controller may result in premature pump failure.
